title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian share how they have adopted AI coding tools at scale, discussing workflow changes, productivity measurement, and the shift in software development lifecycle priorities. Key observations include engineers spending less time on pure coding and more on other tasks, with small teams able to deliver significantly faster roadmaps.
